title: 'We're going to unleash Chiang on these people': Rubio says US stepping up Iran campaign
author: FRANCE24
fullText:

 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 22:31
summary: The US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says that the United States is stepping up its campaign in Iran, widening the scope of airstrikes in the country. FRANCE 24's Fraser Jackson reports from Washington.
